landing.welcomeSubtitle: the premier dating app for Bahá'ís seeking meaningful connections!
landing.description: At Unity Hearts, we bring together spiritually-minded singles from around the globe. Whether you're looking for friendship, companionship, or a profound romantic relationship, we are here to help you find your match.
landing.connectWithPeople: Connect with people who share your interests and values
landing.createProfileDesc: Sign up and create your unique profile
landing.discoverMatchesDesc: Browse profiles and find compatible people
landing.startConversationDesc: Connect and chat with your matches
landing.verifiedProfilesDesc: Connect with genuine members who share your faith and values
landing.secureMessagingDesc: Build deep, spiritual connections through heartfelt dialogue
landing.smartMatchingDesc: Find compatible souls from our diverse global Bahá'í community
landing.coreCompatibilityDesc: Find meaningful connections based on shared Core Curriculum activities and interests.
landing.verifiedOnlyDesc: Our pose-matching technology confirms you're talking to real people

block.blockConfirmation: Are you sure you want to block {{name}}? They won't be able to see your profile or message you.
block.unmatchConfirmation: Are you sure you want to unmatch with {{name}}? This will remove your match and delete your conversation.

safety.safetyIntro: At Unity Hearts, your safety is our top priority. Whether you're chatting online or meeting in person, these guidelines will help you have a safe and positive experience while finding meaningful connections.
safety.messagingTip1: Keep conversations on Unity Hearts until you feel comfortable
safety.messagingTip2: Never share financial information or send money
safety.messagingTip3: Be cautious of anyone who asks for personal details too quickly
safety.messagingTip4: Trust your instincts - if something feels off, it probably is
safety.meetingTip1: Always meet in a public place for first dates
safety.meetingTip2: Tell a friend or family member where you're going
safety.meetingTip3: Arrange your own transportation to and from the date
safety.meetingTip4: Keep your phone charged and easily accessible
safety.privacyTip1: Don't share your home or work address early on
safety.privacyTip2: Use Unity Hearts messaging instead of personal phone/email
safety.privacyTip3: Be mindful of what's visible in your photos (addresses, workplace)
safety.privacyTip4: Research your match before meeting - a simple search is OK
safety.redFlagTip1: Requests for money or financial help
safety.redFlagTip2: Refusing to video chat or meet in person
safety.redFlagTip4: Pressuring you to move off the platform quickly
safety.redFlagTip5: Love bombing - excessive affection very early on
safety.securityTip1: Use a strong, unique password for your account
safety.securityTip2: Never click suspicious links sent in messages
safety.securityTip3: Report and block anyone who makes you uncomfortable
safety.videoTip1: Video chat before meeting in person to verify identity
safety.videoTip2: Be aware of what's visible in your background
safety.videoTip3: You can end a call at any time - no explanation needed
safety.videoTip4: Trust your instincts about the person's authenticity
safety.reportConcernsDesc: If someone makes you feel unsafe, don't hesitate to take action
safety.blockUsersDesc: Instantly prevent someone from contacting you
safety.reportProfilesDesc: Alert our team to investigate suspicious behavior
safety.contactSupportDesc: Reach out to us through the contact page
safety.emergencyResourcesDesc: If you're in immediate danger, please contact emergency services (911 in US)

gdpr.title: Data & Privacy (GDPR)
gdpr.description: Manage your personal data in accordance with privacy regulations
gdpr.exportDescription: Download all your personal data in JSON format
gdpr.exportSuccessDesc: Your data has been downloaded successfully.
gdpr.exportFailedDesc: Failed to export your data. Please try again.
gdpr.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data
gdpr.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers, including:
gdpr.emailMismatchDesc: Please enter your email correctly to confirm deletion.
gdpr.deleteSuccessDesc: Your account and all associated data have been deleted.
gdpr.deleteFailedDesc: Failed to delete your account. Please contact support.
